rulings.Case Title: KENNETH MOSES SR. VS. KAISER GYPSUM COMPANY, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Setting Aside Default And Default Judgment Entered Against James A. Nelson, Co., Inc.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for December 29, 2016, Thursday, in Department 503, Line 1. DEFENDANT CENTURY INDEMNITY COMPANY'S, Motion For An Order Setting Aside Default And Default Judgment Entered Against James A. Nelson, Co., Inc. Specially appearing Century Indemnity Company's motion for an order setting aside default and default judgment entered against James A. Nelson, Co., Inc. is continued on the court's own motion to January 11, 2017. =(503/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: MARK FELKER VS. CERTAINTEED CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
